# IR_Collect parser fixture corpus

Corpus version: 1

These are small, deterministic binary fixtures for IR_Collect's byte-level parsers. They are generated by `FixtureCorpus.Build()` and regenerated with:

```
IR_Collect_review.exe -make-fixtures tests\fixtures
```

The `-test` self-test suite validates every file here against the live parser, and also re-generates each fixture in memory and asserts byte-equality so the committed corpus can never silently drift from the builder.

## Synthesized fixtures

| Format | Path | Category | Expected |
|---|---|---|---|
| lnk | `lnk/valid_unicode_localbasepath.lnk` | valid | parses to `C:\Users\x\secret.docx` |
| lnk | `lnk/valid_ansi_localbasepath.lnk` | valid | parses to `C:\temp\a.txt` |
| lnk | `lnk/truncated_header.lnk` | truncated | degrades safely (no throw) |
| lnk | `lnk/no_linkinfo_flag.lnk` | malformed | degrades safely (no throw) |
| mft_runlist | `mft_runlist/valid_two_runs.bin` | valid | count == 2 |
| mft_runlist | `mft_runlist/truncated_overclaim.bin` | truncated | degrades safely (no throw) |
| mft_runlist | `mft_runlist/zero_length_run.bin` | malformed | degrades safely (no throw) |
| srum_idblob | `srum_idblob/sid_localsystem.bin` | valid | parses to `S-1-5-18` |
| srum_idblob | `srum_idblob/utf16_appid_text.bin` | valid | parses to `C:\app.exe` |
| srum_idblob | `srum_idblob/malformed_subauth_overflow.bin` | malformed | degrades safely (no throw) |

## Formats requiring a real sample (Phase 2.2)

Container formats below need a real registry hive or ESE database and cannot be faithfully synthesized. Supply real (sanitized) samples to enable differential validation against the reference tools listed.

| Format | Artifact | Validation plan |
|---|---|---|
| amcache | Amcache.hve registry hive | MFTECmd is N/A; compare against AmcacheParser. Sample hives: github.com/EricZimmerman/Samples. |
| shimcache | AppCompatCache (SYSTEM hive value) | Compare against AppCompatCacheParser. Needs a real SYSTEM hive. |
| srudb | SRUDB.dat ESE database | Compare against SrumECmd. Needs a real ESE database; the idblob fixtures above only cover the SID sub-decode. |
| shellbags | UsrClass.dat / NTUSER.dat ShellBags | Compare against SBECmd. Needs real user hives. |
| mft | Full $MFT | Compare against MFTECmd. The run-list fixtures cover only the DATA run-list sub-parser. |

Provenance: all synthesized fixtures are constructed byte-by-byte from format specifications (MS-SHLLINK, NTFS run-list, MS-DTYP SID). They contain no real evidence and are safe to publish.
